@@ -535,7 +535,72 @@ final class AppControllerTests: XCTestCase {
         await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.stop)
         await waitUntil { controller.status == .ready }
 
-        XCTAssertEqual(learningCoordinator.snapshots, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(learningCoordinator.snapshots, [try! XCTUnwrap(pasteDeliverer.snapshot)])
+    }
+
+    @MainActor
+    func testLearnedCorrectionCallbackShowsOverlayMessage() async {
+        let settings = makeSettings()
+        let loader = AppControllerSpeechModelLoader()
+        loader.cachedModelIDs = [SpeechModelDescriptor.whisperSmallEnglish.id]
+        let hotkeyMonitor = AppControllerHotkeyMonitor()
+        let manager = SpeechModelManager(
+            catalog: [.whisperSmallEnglish],
+            loader: loader
+        )
+        let recorder = AppControllerAudioRecorder()
+        recorder.samplesToReturn = [0.2, -0.1, 0.4]
+        let transcriber = AppControllerSpeechTranscriber()
+        transcriber.result = "transcribed text"
+        let cleanupModelManager = AppControllerCleanupModelManager()
+        cleanupModelManager.phase = .ready
+        cleanupModelManager.loadedModelID = settings.selectedCleanupModelKind
+        let cleanupPipeline = AppControllerCleanupPipeline()
+        cleanupPipeline.result = CleanupResult(
+            text: "corrected text",
+            usedFallback: false,
+            modelDuration: 0.2,
+            postProcessDuration: 0.1,
+            diagnosticTranscript: nil
+        )
+        let pasteDeliverer = AppControllerTextPasteDeliverer()
+        pasteDeliverer.snapshot = PasteSessionSnapshot(
+            pastedText: "corrected text",
+            timestamp: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1234),
+            applicationBundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor",
+            windowID: 77,
+            windowFrame: CGRect(x: 10, y: 20, width: 300, height: 200),
+            focusedElementFrame: CGRect(x: 50, y: 80, width: 120, height: 40),
+            focusedElementText: "corrected text"
+        )
+        let learningCoordinator = AppControllerPostPasteLearningCoordinator()
+        let overlay = AppControllerOverlayPresenter()
+        let controller = AppController(
+            settingsStore: settings,
+            speechModelManager: manager,
+            hotkeyMonitor: hotkeyMonitor,
+            cleanupModelManager: cleanupModelManager,
+            audioRecorder: recorder,
+            speechTranscriber: transcriber,
+            cleanupPipeline: cleanupPipeline,
+            textPasteDeliverer: pasteDeliverer,
+            postPasteLearningCoordinator: learningCoordinator,
+            overlayPresenter: overlay
+        )
+
+        await controller.start()
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.start(.pushToTalk))
+        await hotkeyMonitor.emit(.stop)
+        await waitUntil { controller.status == .ready }
+
+        learningCoordinator.emitLearnedCorrection(
+            CleanupReplacement(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper")
+        )
+
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            overlay.events.last,
+            .show(.learnedCorrection(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper"))
+        )
     }
 
     @MainActor
@@ -1748,11 +1813,16 @@ private final class AppControllerTextPasteDeliverer: TextPasteDelivering {
 }
 
 private final class AppControllerPostPasteLearningCoordinator: PostPasteLearningCoordinating {
+    var onLearnedCorrection: ((CleanupReplacement) -> Void)?
     private(set) var snapshots: [PasteSessionSnapshot] = []
 
     func recordPaste(_ snapshot: PasteSessionSnapshot) {
         snapshots.append(snapshot)
     }
+
+    func emitLearnedCorrection(_ replacement: CleanupReplacement) {
+        onLearnedCorrection?(replacement)
+    }
 }
 
 private final class AppControllerRecordingArchiver: RecordingArchiving {

@@ -1,56 +1,295 @@
+import CoreGraphics
 import XCTest
 @testable import GhostPepper
 
+@MainActor
 final class PostPasteLearningCoordinatorTests: XCTestCase {
-    func testRecordPasteDetectsCorrectionWhenFocusedTextDiffers() {
-        let coordinator = SimplePostPasteLearningCoordinator()
-        let snapshot = PasteSessionSnapshot(
-            pastedText: "teh cat",
-            timestamp: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1_234),
-            applicationBundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor",
-            windowID: 77,
-            windowFrame: nil,
-            focusedElementFrame: nil,
-            focusedElementText: "the cat"
+    private var suiteName: String!
+    private var defaults: UserDefaults!
+
+    override func setUp() {
+        super.setUp()
+        suiteName = "PostPasteLearningCoordinatorTests.\(UUID().uuidString)"
+        defaults = UserDefaults(suiteName: suiteName)
+        defaults.removePersistentDomain(forName: suiteName)
+    }
+
+    override func tearDown() {
+        defaults.removePersistentDomain(forName: suiteName)
+        defaults = nil
+        suiteName = nil
+        super.tearDown()
+    }
+
+    func testCoordinatorLearnsEmbeddedReplacementAfterTwoStablePolls() async {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+        let poller = PostPasteLearningSnapshotPoller(
+            snapshots: [
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use ghost paper for dictation"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use Ghost Pepper for dictation"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use Ghost Pepper for dictation"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use Ghost Pepper for dictation"),
+            ]
         )
+        let sleep = PostPasteLearningSleepRecorder()
+        let coordinator = PostPasteLearningCoordinator(
+            settingsStore: store,
+            snapshotPoller: poller,
+            sleep: sleep.sleep(for:)
+        )
+        var learned: [CleanupReplacement] = []
+        coordinator.onLearnedCorrection = { learned.append($0) }
+
+        coordinator.recordPaste(makeSnapshot(text: "I use ghost paper for dictation"))
 
-        coordinator.recordPaste(snapshot)
+        await waitUntil { learned.count == 1 }
 
         XCTAssertEqual(
-            coordinator.observations,
-            [
-                PostPasteLearningObservation(
-                    pastedText: "teh cat",
-                    focusedElementText: "the cat",
-                    correctionDetected: true
-                )
+            learned,
+            [CleanupReplacement(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper")]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.commonlyMisheardDraft, "ghost paper -> Ghost Pepper")
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            store.commonlyMisheardReplacements,
+            [CleanupReplacement(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper")]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(poller.captureCallCount, 4)
+        XCTAssertEqual(
+            sleep.durations,
+            [.seconds(1), .seconds(1), .seconds(1)]
+        )
+    }
+
+    func testCoordinatorDoesNotStartWhenLearningIsDisabled() async {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+        store.postPasteLearningEnabled = false
+        let poller = PostPasteLearningSnapshotPoller(
+            snapshots: [makeSnapshot(text: "I use ghost paper for dictation")]
+        )
+        let sleep = PostPasteLearningSleepRecorder()
+        let coordinator = PostPasteLearningCoordinator(
+            settingsStore: store,
+            snapshotPoller: poller,
+            sleep: sleep.sleep(for:)
+        )
+        var learned: [CleanupReplacement] = []
+        coordinator.onLearnedCorrection = { learned.append($0) }
+
+        coordinator.recordPaste(makeSnapshot(text: "I use ghost paper for dictation"))
+        await Task.yield()
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(learned.isEmpty)
+        XCTAssertEqual(poller.captureCallCount, 0)
+        XCTAssertEqual(sleep.durations, [])
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.commonlyMisheardDraft, "")
+    }
+
+    func testCoordinatorExpiresQuietlyWhenScreenRecordingPermissionIsDenied() async {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+        let poller = PostPasteLearningSnapshotPoller(
+            snapshots: [makeSnapshot(text: "I use Ghost Pepper for dictation")]
+        )
+        let sleep = PostPasteLearningSleepRecorder()
+        let coordinator = PostPasteLearningCoordinator(
+            settingsStore: store,
+            snapshotPoller: poller,
+            screenRecordingPermissionStateProvider: { .denied },
+            sleep: sleep.sleep(for:)
+        )
+        var learned: [CleanupReplacement] = []
+        coordinator.onLearnedCorrection = { learned.append($0) }
+
+        coordinator.recordPaste(makeSnapshot(text: "I use ghost paper for dictation"))
+
+        await waitUntil { sleep.durations.count == 15 }
+        await Task.yield()
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(learned.isEmpty)
+        XCTAssertEqual(poller.captureCallCount, 0)
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.commonlyMisheardDraft, "")
+    }
+
+    func testCoordinatorAbandonsPollingWhenLearningBecomesDisabled() async {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+        let poller = PostPasteLearningSnapshotPoller(
+            snapshots: [
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use ghost paper for dictation"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use Ghost Pepper for dictation"),
             ]
         )
+        let sleep = PostPasteLearningSleepRecorder()
+        sleep.onSleep = { _ in
+            store.postPasteLearningEnabled = false
+        }
+        let coordinator = PostPasteLearningCoordinator(
+            settingsStore: store,
+            snapshotPoller: poller,
+            sleep: sleep.sleep(for:)
+        )
+        var learned: [CleanupReplacement] = []
+        coordinator.onLearnedCorrection = { learned.append($0) }
+
+        coordinator.recordPaste(makeSnapshot(text: "I use ghost paper for dictation"))
+
+        await waitUntil { poller.captureCallCount == 1 }
+        await Task.yield()
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(learned.isEmpty)
+        XCTAssertEqual(poller.captureCallCount, 1)
+        XCTAssertEqual(sleep.durations, [.seconds(1)])
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.commonlyMisheardDraft, "")
     }
 
-    func testRecordPasteIgnoresEmptyFocusedText() {
-        let coordinator = SimplePostPasteLearningCoordinator()
-        let snapshot = PasteSessionSnapshot(
-            pastedText: "transcribed text",
-            timestamp: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1_234),
-            applicationBundleIdentifier: "com.example.Editor",
-            windowID: 77,
-            windowFrame: nil,
-            focusedElementFrame: nil,
-            focusedElementText: "   "
+    func testCoordinatorIgnoresApplicationSwitchesUntilSourceAppReturns() async {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+        let poller = PostPasteLearningSnapshotPoller(
+            snapshots: [
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use ghost paper for dictation"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "Edited elsewhere", bundleID: "com.example.Other"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use Ghost Pepper for dictation"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use Ghost Pepper for dictation"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use Ghost Pepper for dictation"),
+            ]
         )
+        let sleep = PostPasteLearningSleepRecorder()
+        let coordinator = PostPasteLearningCoordinator(
+            settingsStore: store,
+            snapshotPoller: poller,
+            sleep: sleep.sleep(for:)
+        )
+        var learned: [CleanupReplacement] = []
+        coordinator.onLearnedCorrection = { learned.append($0) }
+
+        coordinator.recordPaste(makeSnapshot(text: "I use ghost paper for dictation"))
 
-        coordinator.recordPaste(snapshot)
+        await waitUntil { learned.count == 1 }
 
         XCTAssertEqual(
-            coordinator.observations,
-            [
-                PostPasteLearningObservation(
-                    pastedText: "transcribed text",
-                    focusedElementText: "   ",
-                    correctionDetected: false
-                )
+            learned,
+            [CleanupReplacement(wrong: "ghost paper", right: "Ghost Pepper")]
+        )
+        XCTAssertEqual(poller.captureCallCount, 5)
+    }
+
+    func testCoordinatorIgnoresDuplicateLearnedReplacementWithoutNotification() async {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+        store.commonlyMisheardDraft = "ghost paper -> Ghost Pepper"
+        let poller = PostPasteLearningSnapshotPoller(
+            snapshots: [
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use ghost paper for dictation"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use Ghost Pepper for dictation"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use Ghost Pepper for dictation"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "I use Ghost Pepper for dictation"),
+            ]
+        )
+        let sleep = PostPasteLearningSleepRecorder()
+        let coordinator = PostPasteLearningCoordinator(
+            settingsStore: store,
+            snapshotPoller: poller,
+            sleep: sleep.sleep(for:)
+        )
+        var learned: [CleanupReplacement] = []
+        coordinator.onLearnedCorrection = { learned.append($0) }
+
+        coordinator.recordPaste(makeSnapshot(text: "I use ghost paper for dictation"))
+
+        await waitUntil { poller.captureCallCount == 4 }
+        await Task.yield()
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(learned.isEmpty)
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.commonlyMisheardDraft, "ghost paper -> Ghost Pepper")
+    }
+
+    func testCoordinatorRejectsPunctuationOnlyChanges() async {
+        let store = SettingsStore(userDefaults: defaults)
+        let poller = PostPasteLearningSnapshotPoller(
+            snapshots: [
+                makeSnapshot(text: "hello world"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "hello world!"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "hello world!"),
+                makeSnapshot(text: "hello world!"),
             ]
         )
+        let sleep = PostPasteLearningSleepRecorder()
+        let coordinator = PostPasteLearningCoordinator(
+            settingsStore: store,
+            snapshotPoller: poller,
+            sleep: sleep.sleep(for:)
+        )
+        var learned: [CleanupReplacement] = []
+        coordinator.onLearnedCorrection = { learned.append($0) }
+
+        coordinator.recordPaste(makeSnapshot(text: "hello world"))
+
+        await waitUntil { poller.captureCallCount == 4 }
+        await Task.yield()
+
+        XCTAssertTrue(learned.isEmpty)
+        XCTAssertEqual(store.commonlyMisheardDraft, "")
+    }
+
+    private func makeSnapshot(
+        text: String,
+        bundleID: String? = "com.example.Editor"
+    ) -> PasteSessionSnapshot {
+        PasteSessionSnapshot(
+            pastedText: text,
+            timestamp: Date(timeIntervalSince1970: 1_234),
+            applicationBundleIdentifier: bundleID,
+            windowID: 77,
+            windowFrame: CGRect(x: 1, y: 2, width: 300, height: 200),
+            focusedElementFrame: CGRect(x: 10, y: 20, width: 200, height: 40),
+            focusedElementText: text
+        )
+    }
+
+    private func waitUntil(
+        timeout: Duration = .seconds(1),
+        pollInterval: Duration = .milliseconds(10),
+        file: StaticString = #filePath,
+        line: UInt = #line,
+        condition: @escaping @MainActor () -> Bool
+    ) async {
+        let start = ContinuousClock.now
+        while !condition() {
+            if ContinuousClock.now - start > timeout {
+                XCTFail("Condition was not met before timeout.", file: file, line: line)
+                return
+            }
+
+            try? await Task.sleep(for: pollInterval)
+        }
+    }
+}
+
+@MainActor
+private final class PostPasteLearningSnapshotPoller: PostPasteLearningSnapshotPolling {
+    private(set) var captureCallCount = 0
+    private var snapshots: [PasteSessionSnapshot]
+
+    init(snapshots: [PasteSessionSnapshot]) {
+        self.snapshots = snapshots
+    }
+
+    func captureCurrentSnapshot(for snapshot: PasteSessionSnapshot) -> PasteSessionSnapshot? {
+        _ = snapshot
+        captureCallCount += 1
+        guard !snapshots.isEmpty else {
+            return nil
+        }
+
+        return snapshots.removeFirst()
+    }
+}
+
+@MainActor
+private final class PostPasteLearningSleepRecorder {
+    var durations: [Duration] = []
+    var onSleep: ((Duration) -> Void)?
+
+    func sleep(for duration: Duration) async {
+        durations.append(duration)
+        onSleep?(duration)
+        await Task.yield()
     }
 }

@@ -120,3 +120,13 @@
 - Wired OCR prefetch through `AppController` so eligible recording sessions launch screen capture before audio start, failed starts and termination cancel pending prefetch work, stop-and-transcribe resolves prefetched context into cleanup requests and archive entries, and post-paste learning stays enabled in settings while remaining inert without Screen Recording permission.
 - Expanded controller and screen-context coverage for permission-aware OCR diagnostics, prefetch lifecycle transitions, prompt-context delivery, performance-trace OCR timing, and the existing settings-shell recovery prompt and persistence contracts that this iteration now traces to completion.
 **Summary:** Delivered the OCR screen-context slice on top of the existing cleanup pipeline. Ghost Pepper now captures the frontmost eligible window with ScreenCaptureKit, recognizes window text with Apple Vision, starts OCR prefetch at recording start when cleanup and frontmost-window context are both available, resolves the prefetched context after recording stops, records OCR timing in the dictation trace, archives resolved window text with the session, and cancels pending OCR work during failed starts and application termination. During wrap-up, the scope audit confirmed that the Screen Recording recovery prompt, OCR and post-paste-learning settings toggles, and the persistence contracts for `frontmostWindowContextEnabled` and OCR prefetch disposal were already present and are now traced to this iteration rather than left pending.
+
+## ITER-0012
+
+**Completed:** 2026-04-10
+**Stories delivered:** STORY-0040, STORY-0046, STORY-0048, STORY-0289, STORY-0290, STORY-0291, STORY-0292, STORY-0293, STORY-0294, STORY-0295, STORY-0296, STORY-0297, STORY-0298, STORY-0299, STORY-0300, STORY-0301, STORY-0302, STORY-0303, STORY-0304, STORY-0305, STORY-0306, STORY-0307, STORY-0308, STORY-0309, STORY-0310, STORY-0311, STORY-0312, STORY-0313, STORY-0314, STORY-0315, STORY-0316, STORY-0317, STORY-0318, STORY-0319, STORY-0320, STORY-0321, STORY-0322, STORY-0323, STORY-0324, STORY-0325, STORY-0326, STORY-0327, STORY-0328, STORY-0329, STORY-0330, STORY-0331, STORY-0332, STORY-0333, STORY-0334, STORY-0335, STORY-0336, STORY-0337, STORY-0338, STORY-0339, STORY-0340, STORY-0341, STORY-0342, STORY-0343, STORY-0344, STORY-0345, STORY-0346, STORY-0347, STORY-0348, STORY-0952
+**Tasks executed:**
+- Added parsed correction-store surfaces for preferred transcriptions, OCR custom words, and misheard replacements, plus a programmatic append path for learned replacements that preserves the raw draft format in `UserDefaults`.
+- Hardened deterministic correction application and post-paste learning inference so narrow replacements are applied longest-first without overlap, learned replacements use the intended embedded phrase, duplicate learned pairs are ignored, and missing Screen Recording permission fails quietly instead of gating the whole flow.
+- Wired the real post-paste learning coordinator into `AppController`, including live paste-session polling, learned-correction overlay callbacks, OCR custom-word reuse from the correction store, and focused controller/coordinator/settings coverage for the adaptive correction path.
+**Summary:** Delivered the corrections and post-paste learning slice on top of real paste delivery, OCR context, and cleanup. Ghost Pepper now persists structured correction rules behind the Corrections settings drafts, reuses preferred transcription terms for both OCR and deterministic cleanup, learns new 1-2 word replacements from stable post-paste edits, shows a learned-correction overlay when a new rule is stored, and quietly expires the learning window when Screen Recording text is unavailable while continuing to show the documented recovery prompt in Settings. No stories were moved forward during wrap-up because the full ITER-0012 scope is now satisfied in place.
